mapper.insert: insert into db_table_schema (id, datasource_id, table_name, alias, description, columns_json, sample_queries, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{datasourceId}, #{tableName}, #{alias}, #{description}, #{columnsJson}, #{sampleQueries}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from db_table_schema where datasource_id = #{datasourceId} and table_name = #{tableName}
select * from db_table_schema where datasource_id = #{datasourceId} and enabled = 1 order by table_name asc
mapper.update: update db_table_schema set alias = #{alias}, description = #{description}, columns_json = #{columnsJson}, sample_queries = #{sampleQueries}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update db_table_schema set columns_json = #{columnsJson}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update db_table_schema set enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
